headline: Marvell Technology, Inc. (MRVL) Names Adobe’s Dan Durn as Finance Chief
summary: Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MRVL) is one of the 10 Best Photonic Computing Stocks to Buy Now. On June 11, Reuters reported that Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MRVL) named Dan Durn as chief financial officer, succeeding Willem Meintjes, with Durn set to start on June 15. Meintjes remains in an advisory role through April 2027. CEO Matt […]
